content.text:
Cannot execute multiple commands at once.
Please run each command separately OR chain them into a single command via && or ;
Provided commands:
(1) # Get all unique token types from all test cases
(2) for dir in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-1 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-2 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3; do
  for f in "$dir"/*.sysu.c; do
    /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens "$f" 2>&1 | grep -oP "^[\w_]+" 
  done
done | sort -u

  done
done | sort -u
